title: Arjun Krish and Ria Dinesh on winning the award for the Best Telefilm at Kerala State Television Awards
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Arjun Krish and Ria Dinesh were awarded for their work.
*   They won in the "Best Telefilm" category.
*   The recognition took place at the Kerala State Television Awards.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Poll heat rises in Palakkad as BJP trains guns on UDF MLA scandal
content:
Political tension is escalating in Palakkad ahead of the 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections.
*   The BJP is intensifying its criticism against a sitting UDF MLA.
*   This increased "poll heat" is fueled by an alleged scandal involving the UDF representative.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Political crossovers gather pace in Kerala as Assembly elections near
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The 2026 Kerala Assembly elections are drawing closer.
*   Political crossovers, or leaders switching parties, are significantly increasing in the state.
*   This acceleration in party changes is directly linked to the approaching election cycle.

title: ‘Displeased’ Jeevan Reddy leads maize farmers’ rally in Jagtial against Govt
content:
A displeased Jeevan Reddy led a protest rally.
*   The rally consisted of maize farmers, presumably protesting issues related to their crop.
*   The protest took place in Jagtial and was directed against the government.

title: Transgender communities across India demand withdrawal of Bill to redefine trans people
content:
Transgender communities across India are collectively demanding the withdrawal of a specific Bill.
*   The controversial Bill aims to redefine the identity and legal status of transgender people.
*   The community views this redefinition as an infringement on their rights and identity, prompting their strong opposition.

title: AAP govt. fulfilled all pre-poll promises in just 4 years: Punjab CM
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Punjab Chief Minister claims the AAP government has fulfilled all its pre-election promises.
*   The CM asserts that *every* pledge made before the polls has been delivered.
*   This comprehensive achievement was reportedly accomplished in a remarkably short period of just four years.

title: Anna University, Ramco Systems sign MoU to establish advanced ERP lab
content:
Anna University and Ramco Systems have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU).
*   The primary goal of this MoU is to establish an advanced Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) laboratory.
*   This collaboration aims to provide students with hands-on experience and advanced training in ERP systems.

title: Tamil writer Jayamohan announces ‘India’s biggest literary award‘
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Tamil writer Jayamohan has announced the creation of a new literary award.
*   The award is being described as "India's biggest literary award."
*   This marks a significant new initiative in the Indian literary landscape.

title: Government clears 23 institutions to set up ‘quantum labs’
content:
The government has officially cleared an initiative.
*   A total of 23 institutions have received this clearance.
*   The purpose is to allow these institutions to set up 'quantum labs'.

title: Fuel crisis is man-made, Opposition says, targeting Centre’s foreign policy
content:
The Opposition claims the ongoing fuel crisis is not a natural occurrence but is "man-made."
*   They attribute the cause of this crisis directly to the foreign policy decisions made by the Centre (the ruling government).
*   This statement is a targeted criticism aimed at the government's handling of international relations, implying it has negatively impacted fuel availability or cost.
